{{Quote|So you're heading for the Floating Fish? Nice place. Nasrabi keeps it clean, runs some honest games.|[[Neeta]]|<ref name="Imperial Double-Cross">''[[Imperial Double-Cross]]''</ref>}}
'''The Floating Fish''' was a [[Casino/Legends|casino]] owned and operated by [[Mussat Nasrabi]] on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. Located on [[Level 42 (Cloud City)|Level 42]] in the [[Tourist District]], it was registered with the [[Gambling Guild|Cloud City Gambling Guild]].

The casino was small but high-class, a two-storied establishment fronting onto an elegant plaza. Its external windows were polarized to provide privacy for its clients. Inside, it was tastefully decorated, with ornate pillars and a number of fish filled globes hanging from the ceiling. The casino gained a reputation for being clean and honest, and provided many games, such as [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] and [[Trin sticks]].

The Floating Fish had a broad clientèle, with numerous [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]], [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]], [[Duros/Legends|Duros]], and [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]] frequenting it. One of its regulars was the [[Human/Legends|Human]] woman, [[Neeta]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Imperial Double-Cross]]'' {{1st}}
